lastReleaseMessage: library: grid-auto-rows:150px so tiles can't collapse short; tile fills cell at 100%/100%; container 480px tall for three rows; images stop overflowing into the next row

barRaise.topFinding: The audit-to-fix loop started closing: a 2026-06-03 canonical audit ran and drift-auto-fix applied two safe PROJECT_SPEC.md corrections (Saved-labels checkbox done, herb count 199) and enqueued the four structural items it could not auto-apply, the first backlog movement in six reports. But the two standing HIGH findings are untouched and a third surfaced: write-dashboard-status.ps1 still hardcodes barRaise to null, audit.findings to 0/0/0, and workQueueDepth to 0, so the next release nulls this writeback again; the 47 em-dashes still ship across all six public files; and .work-queue.json holds auto-safe yaa-spec items pending since 2026-05-18 (16 days), so the drain side is not firing. Three perimeter HIGHs (dashboard clobber, em-dashes, undraining queue); the running label engine remains healthy.
